name: Protogen_87
description: A orange and black protogen. He is very intelligent, powerful, and chill. He harnesses the powers of space and the black hole known as M87. He is known as a universal threat due to his immense strength and powers. He lives in space, at the black hole called M87. (A protogen is a robotic like furry, that is part robot and part furry.)
creator: Block_Jeff
